5049.issue: [E5049] process.env is used in source files (src/lib/debugger.ts, src/main.ts). process.env is incompatible with compact mode. Please use adapter configuration instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (install/installTypings.js, src/lib/inspect.ts, src/lib/utils.ts, src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.javascript/blob/master/io-package.json).
